home.whyTitle: Why Dallas Homeowners Choose NTX Handyman

cta.headline: Ready to Get Started?
cta.subheadline: Contact us today for a free, no-obligation estimate. Your home deserves the best.

servicesPage.intro: From quick fixes to major renovations, our comprehensive handyman services cover every corner of your home. We bring skill, reliability, and a customer-first approach to every job in Dallas.

services.title: General Repairs & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Expert fixes for everyday wear and tear – from squeaky doors to broken tiles.
services.longDescription: Keep your home in top shape with our thorough repair services. We handle everything from patching drywall and fixing leaky faucets to repairing decks and fences. Our team uses quality materials and proven methods to ensure durable, seamless repairs that blend with your existing surfaces.
benefits: Extends the life of your home's features
Prevents small issues from becoming costly problems
Enhances safety and comfort for your family

process.title: Inspection & Diagnosis
process.description: We assess the issue, identify root causes, and explain your options clearly.

process.title: Transparent Quote
process.description: You receive a detailed estimate with no hidden fees before any work begins.

process.title: Professional Execution
process.description: Our skilled technicians complete the repair efficiently, leaving your space clean and restored.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a repair request?
faqs.answer: We typically schedule within 24-48 hours. For urgent issues, we offer priority service to address them promptly.

faqs.question: Do you provide warranties on repairs?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a satisfaction guarantee. If a repair doesn't meet your expectations, we'll make it right.

services.title: Interior Painting & Drywall
services.shortDescription: Transform your rooms with flawless paint finishes and smooth drywall installations.
services.longDescription: Give your interiors a fresh look with our professional painting and drywall services. We prep surfaces meticulously, repair any imperfections, and apply premium paints for a beautiful, long-lasting finish. Whether it's a single accent wall or an entire home, our team delivers crisp lines and even coverage.
benefits: Increases home value and curb appeal
Protects walls from moisture and wear

process.title: Surface Preparation
process.description: We patch holes, sand rough areas, and prime surfaces to ensure paint adheres perfectly.

process.title: Color Consultation
process.description: Our team helps you choose the right sheen and color to match your style and lighting.

process.title: Precision Painting
process.description: Using professional tools and techniques, we apply paint evenly with clean edges and no drips.

faqs.question: What type of paint do you use?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality, low-VOC paints from trusted brands like Sherwin-Williams and Benjamin Moore for a durable, safe finish.

faqs.question: Do you move furniture and protect floors?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We cover all furniture and floors with drop cloths and plastic, and we move items as needed to ensure full coverage.

services.title: Kitchen & Bath Remodeling
services.shortDescription: Full or partial remodels that blend functionality with modern style.
services.longDescription: Upgrade your kitchen or bathroom with our comprehensive remodeling services. From cabinet installation and countertop replacement to tile backsplashes and fixture upgrades, we manage every detail. Our team coordinates with suppliers to bring your vision to life while respecting your budget and timeline.
benefits: Modernizes outdated spaces for comfort and efficiency

process.title: Design & Planning
process.description: We collaborate with you to create a layout that maximizes space and reflects your taste.

process.title: Material Selection
process.description: We guide you through choosing cabinets, countertops, fixtures, and finishes that fit your style and budget.

process.title: Construction & Installation
process.description: Our skilled crew handles demolition, rough-in, and finishing with minimal disruption to your daily life.

faqs.question: How long does a typical kitchen remodel take?
faqs.answer: Most kitchen remodels take 2-4 weeks depending on scope. We provide a detailed timeline upfront.

faqs.question: Can you work with my existing cabinets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer cabinet refacing and painting as a cost-effective alternative to full replacement.

services.title: Deck & Fence Construction
services.shortDescription: Beautiful, durable outdoor structures built to withstand Texas weather.
services.longDescription: Create your perfect outdoor living space with custom decks and fences. We design and build using pressure-treated lumber, composite materials, or cedar – tailored to your property and preferences. Our structures are built to last, with proper footings, drainage, and fasteners that resist rust and rot.
benefits: Expands your living and entertaining area
Adds privacy and security to your yard
Increases property value and curb appeal

process.title: Site Evaluation
process.description: We assess your yard's layout, soil conditions, and local codes to design a compliant structure.

process.title: Custom Design
process.description: We create a plan that matches your style – from classic wood to modern composite with built-in seating.

process.title: Professional Build
process.description: Our team constructs your deck or fence with precision, using quality materials and proper techniques for longevity.

faqs.question: What materials do you recommend for Dallas weather?
faqs.answer: For decks, we recommend composite or pressure-treated pine with stainless steel fasteners to withstand humidity and heat. For fences, cedar or vinyl are excellent choices.

faqs.question: Do you handle permits?
faqs.answer: Yes, we obtain all necessary permits and ensure your deck or fence meets local building codes.

about.headline: Your Local Handyman Experts in Dallas
about.mission: To provide Dallas homeowners with reliable, high-quality handyman services that make homeownership easier and more enjoyable.
story: NTX Handyman & Contractors LLC was founded with a simple mission: deliver honest, skilled craftsmanship to our neighbors in Dallas. What started as a one-man operation fixing small repairs has grown into a trusted team serving hundreds of homes across the metroplex. Our founder, a licensed contractor with over 15 years of experience, saw a need for a handyman service that combined professional standards with genuine care for customers.

Today, we continue that tradition. Every project – from a simple faucet repair to a full kitchen remodel – receives the same dedication to quality and transparency. We invest in our team's training, use top-tier materials, and communicate openly with clients. Our reputation is built on referrals and repeat business, and we're proud to be a go-to resource for Dallas homeowners.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do what we say, use materials as quoted, and never cut corners.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: Our work meets the highest standards of quality and durability.

coreValues.title: Respect
coreValues.description: We treat your home and time with the utmost respect, leaving it cleaner than we found it.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: As a local business, we are committed to serving and supporting the Dallas community.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? We're here to help. Call or fill out the form for a free estimate.
